    L

    loadUserByUsername(String) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.CustomUserDetailsService
    Override method that gets user by its username
    login(LoginRequestDto) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.AuthService
    Processes the login request by using the authentication manager, checking if the user exists and if the credentials are valid
    LoginRequestDto - Class in com.pitlane.pitlane.dto
    Dto with the information to log in a user
    LoginRequestDto() - Constructor for class com.pitlane.pitlane.dto.LoginRequestDto
